task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium location to Mount Everest summit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window should be visible, showing the latitude set to 27.9881° N, longitude to 86.9250° E, and altitude to 8848m.

task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium date and time to May 22, 2024, 20:00 UTC
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date and Time window or the bottom toolbar should display the date as 2024-05-22 and the time as 20:00:00. The timezone should be set to UTC.

task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium display settings (atmosphere, landscape, grids, cardinal points, no constellations)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Stellarium sky view should show the atmosphere, the ground landscape, the azimuthal grid lines, and cardinal direction letters (N, S, E, W). Constellation lines and labels must NOT be visible.

task_completion.description: Document lunar illumination and sunrise time with screenshots
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager open to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ showing saved image files, or an image viewer/Stellarium notification confirming screenshots of the Moon (at 20:00 UTC) and the Sun (at the horizon during sunrise) were taken and saved to the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Create the summit briefing document with required information
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/summit_briefing.txt. The text must include the location (Everest/coordinates), the date (May 22, 2024), the moon phase at the start (~99.3% or Full Moon), and the observed UTC sunrise time.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using the Stellarium application to observe the moon and fast-forwarding/adjusting time to find the sunrise, rather than just searching the web for the answers.

integrity.description: Screenshots are genuine captures of the Stellarium application
integrity.visual_evidence: The images saved in the screenshots directory should clearly be from the Stellarium interface (containing its UI elements or rendering style), not downloaded images from the internet.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the briefing document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or echoing the gathered information into summit_briefing.txt using a text editor or terminal, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mount Everest coordinates: 27.9881° N, 86.9250° E, altitude 8848m. Date/Time: May 22, 2024, 20:00 UTC. The moon phase at this time is a Full Moon (approx 99.3% illumination). Briefing document must be saved at /home/ga/Desktop/summit_briefing.txt and screenshots must be saved in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
